purpose: markdownlint configuration that disables the line-length rule (MD013) and the closing-heading-punctuation rule (MD060) project-wide to accommodate long code-span lines and heading style in docs.
invariants: MD013 (line length) is disabled — docs can have lines longer than 80 characters
MD060 (no trailing punctuation in headings) is disabled — headings may end with punctuation
gotchas: All other markdownlint rules remain at their defaults — only these two are suppressed
This file must remain valid JSON; a syntax error silently disables all markdownlint configuration
